title: Minestuck Expanded
description: Addon and compat mod for Minestuck
body:
Minestuck Plus is an addon mod for Minestuck 1.21.1 that features several new weapons, a new modus, as well as compatibility with the [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight), and [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts).

![A collection of items the mod adds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/883f50d053838bbf26d9aae03619dad0f400345d.png)

Currently, the mod adds:

- Grist Costs for pre-existing Minecraft itesm that previously did not have them
- 4 equipable beaglepusses
- 15 different weapons
- The Roulette modus: A modus that randomly selects an item that "allows" it to be fetched.
- 13 new armor trims based on both Homestuck aspects as well as a spirograph themed trim.
- Raw cruxite, uranium and bi-dye can be used as valid trimming materials.
- All plushies in the base Minestuck mod now have a placeable alternative.

Thought not required, JEI is strongly recommeneded.
